product.name: Rugshop Marbella Contemporary Boho Non-Shedding Patio Deck Backyard Indoor/Outdoor Runner Rug 2' x 7' Gray
product.description: Experience the comfort, durability and versatility of this rug inside or outside of your home. It is Machine made in Turkey by using 100% polypropylene. Dual usage of this rug enables it to be easily cleaned. The bohemian eclectic tribal and stripe pattern add visual glare to any space.This collection offers area rugs that are suitable for all indoor/outdoor spaces.
features: Weather-ready build for indoor/outdoor living: 100% polypropylene flatweave resists sun, rain and daily traffic—perfect for patios, decks, balconies, entryways and other busy spaces around the home.
Machine washable care on smaller sizes; for quick refresh just shake, vacuum or rinse with a garden hose. Fast-drying fibers make upkeep simple and help the rug look fresh through every season.
Fade resistant, colorfast yarns keep the contemporary boho tribal and stripe pattern crisp and on-trend, pairing effortlessly with modern, coastal and farmhouse outdoor furniture.
Low-profile, non-shedding construction glides under doors, won’t trap dirt and stands up to high-traffic areas—great for kitchens, hallways, dining zones and family-friendly outdoor lounges.
Lightweight yet durable and easy to roll out flat; use a rug pad indoors for added grip and cushioning. Designed for versatile styling from patio or deck to living room and home office.
